message:
fix(sync): make OwnedAcquireFuture public for external await composition

OwnedAcquireFuture was a private struct, preventing downstream code from
naming the future type returned by OwnedSemaphorePermit::acquire(). This
blocked use cases where the future needs to be stored in a struct field,
passed as a type parameter, or used in select!/join! macros that require
naming the future type explicitly. Making it pub with a doc comment
enables these composition patterns without changing any behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
